# I am Shining

> A free, privacy-first web tool for creating golden #Shining profile pictures and matching LinkedIn banners. Everything runs in your browser — your photo is never uploaded to a server.

URL: https://i-am-shining.com
Brand: #Shining — golden, optimistic, full of light

## What the site does
- Upload a profile photo (drag-and-drop, click-to-browse)
- Apply the golden #Shining crescent frame overlay
- Choose a frame style: Gold, Rose, or Silver — the iridescent shine and metallic ring re-tint to match
- Auto-frame the head: face landmarks (eyes + mouth) are detected on-device and the photo is centred and zoomed so the face fills ~62% of the crop
- Adjust the iridescent "shine intensity" with a slider
- Pan and zoom to position the photo (drag, scroll, pinch, or double-tap)
- Download the finished profile picture as a 600×600 px PNG
- Generate a matching 1584×396 px LinkedIn banner with a golden kaleidoscope effect that mirrors features from the uploaded photo
- The banner can be downloaded with or without an "I am #Shining" text overlay
- The kaleidoscope's sample point and zoom track the user's pan/zoom of the profile crop, so the two stay visually linked
- Save directly to the iPhone Photos library via the Web Share API

## Brand and movement
#Shining is a movement for people who want to show up with energy, optimism, and a golden glow. Upgrade your profile picture with the radiant Shining frame and signal to the world that you're in your brightest season.

## Privacy
- 100% client-side processing — no server uploads
- No tracking, no analytics, no account required
- The photo never leaves the user's device
- Face detection (MediaPipe) runs entirely in the browser

## Accessibility
- Keyboard-navigable controls with visible focus rings
- ARIA labels on all interactive elements
- Respects `prefers-reduced-motion`
- Skip link to main content
- WCAG AA colour contrast on body text

## Key pages
- Home / editor: https://i-am-shining.com/
- About: https://i-am-shining.com/about
- FAQ section (on home page): how to add to LinkedIn, cross-platform compatibility, download size, privacy details

## Tech
- Built with Astro, React, TypeScript, Framer Motion, and HTML5 Canvas
- Open source under MIT: https://github.com/hagerling/i-am-shining
- Brand: #Shining — keep it golden

## Contact
- Carl Hagerling — carl.hagerling@gmail.com
